tasks.task: Create a FastAPI project layout: pyproject.toml, src/app/__init__.py, src/app/main.py (app factory only), Dockerfile, .env.example, and a Makefile with run/lint/test targets.
Write SQLAlchemy 2.x models for User (id, email, hashed_password, created_at) and RefreshToken (id, user_id FK, token_hash, expires_at, revoked). Include Alembic migration boilerplate.
Write a Pydantic BaseSettings config class (src/app/config.py) that reads DATABASE_URL, SECRET_KEY, ACCESS_TOKEN_EXPIRE_MINUTES, and REFRESH_TOKEN_EXPIRE_DAYS from environment variables.

Implement src/app/auth/service.py: password hashing (bcrypt via passlib), JWT access token creation/verification (python-jose), and refresh token rotation logic. Use the User and RefreshToken models from write_database_schema.
Write src/app/users/repository.py with async SQLAlchemy functions: get_by_id, get_by_email, create_user, update_password. Use the User model from write_database_schema.

Write src/app/auth/router.py with FastAPI endpoints: POST /auth/register, POST /auth/login (returns access + refresh tokens), POST /auth/refresh, POST /auth/logout. Use implement_auth_service and write_user_repository.
Write src/app/middleware.py with a FastAPI dependency get_current_user that validates the JWT Bearer token and returns the active User. Include an optional require_admin dependency.

Write pytest tests in tests/test_auth.py covering: successful register, duplicate email error, successful login, invalid password, token refresh, and logout. Use httpx AsyncClient against the FastAPI app.
Write a README.md with: project overview, prerequisites, quickstart (make run), API reference table for all auth endpoints, and environment variable documentation.
